name: @tx-meta/dcu-kit
description: Offchain SDK for DCU Toolkit — ROSCA protocol on Cardano

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/multisig/index.ts src/core/index.ts src/escrow/index.ts src/escrow/v2/index.ts src/savings/index.ts src/governance/index.ts --minify --format esm,cjs --dts --clean
scripts.repack: pnpm run build && pnpm pack && mv -f tx-meta-dcu-kit-$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').tgz dcu-kit-$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version').tgz
scripts.examples:setup: pnpm run repack && cd examples && pnpm add file:../dcu-kit-$(node -p 'require("../package.json").version').tgz --force
scripts.examples:create-account: pnpm run examples:setup && cd examples && npx tsx create-account.ts
scripts.examples:create-group: pnpm run examples:setup && cd examples && npx tsx create-group.ts
scripts.examples:join-group: pnpm run examples:setup && cd examples && npx tsx join-group.ts
scripts.examples:rosca-lifecycle: pnpm run examples:setup && cd examples && npx tsx rosca-lifecycle.ts
